programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi defeats Atem, Yugi will prove he's ready to stand on his own, and Atem can join his friends in the world beyond. But Yugi and Atem will be separated forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem still has all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn't have a single monster on the field! Yugi claims that he has a combo that will defeat the Egyptian Gods, but is he simply bragging, or does he actually have a plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they've ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he's to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil's first wave of Duel Monsters, he's shocked to discover that Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power with every turn!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai's secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp's crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba's brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother's company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba, created from the greed and power lust Yugi wiped from Kaiba's soul.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi defeats the Blue Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends' help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When Crusher cheats during a tropical island race with Blaze, AJ manages to rescue his best friend while overcoming obstacles.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: In Dinosaur Valley, Blaze and Zeg show off their amazing robot powers to their dinosaur friends; when they discover three lost little tyrannosauruses, they must use their robot powers to get the babies home safely.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: At the starting line for the race to Sky High Mountain, one of Crusher's cheats threatens to sideline Blaze for good; to get back in this race, Blaze will need power tires.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ go head-to-head against Crusher to race all the way around the Earth.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ help a truck named Snowbie get home in time for the Great Snowball Fight.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When Crusher accidentally knocks a bottle of "grow spice" onto a meatball, it grows to an enormous size and rolls away; Blaze and Pickle transform into robots to stop the meatball before it wrecks the entire town.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze and Pegwheel the Pirate team up for the ultimate treasure hunt; together they must find three keys to unlock a special chest, but Crusher's sailing the high seas too, and he'll do anything to get the treasure first.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Blaze and AJ race under the ocean; Blaze transforms into a submarine and speeds through sunken ships and coral reefs to reach the giant sand castle at the finish line.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: It's a head-to-head showdown when Blaze and Crusher enter the great pizza race.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Swift jets to the rescue when Rod's loud, exuberant singing gets him trapped in an avalanche; Swift and Brody have to rely on each other and their buddy navigating skills to lead some geese to safety in the fog.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: The Cadets team up to rescue TV adventure star Survivor Bear, who comes to Big Swirl to brave Icy Summit; when Swift hurts his wing, Timmy Turtle has to help pilot the Flash-Wing to save the day.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Penny's friend Salty asks Team Top Wing for help after Penny becomes trapped rescuing his old boat; Rod tries to earn three jump badges in one day.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Rod and Brody try to earn a Jungle Exploring badge, but get lost and must work together to help Swift find them; when some lucky students get to be cadets for a day, Top Wing and their junior cadets end up having to rescue their teacher.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Rod is excited to sing at Rhonda's until Chomps and Rocco take the piano; Margo the Monkey and the Banana Bandits break into Headquarters and try to take off with the HQ Command Flyer.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Rod proves that he is a rooster, and not a chicken as he finds a little bear cub lost in the Haunted Cave; a jet-flying bat roars into Danger Canyon to show off his prowess.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Penny saves the day when a stranded polar-bear family floats into the warm water near Big Swirl Island; Team Top Wing saves Shirley Squirrely when her giant flying machine nearly crashes into the ocean.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When Swoops the helicopter loses his rotor, Blaze and AJ head to the Sky Track to try and retrieve it.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ take off into space for a race that's out of this world; along the way to Planet Victory, they meet friendly aliens, dodge asteroids, and face off against Crusher's space ship.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When a nefarious villain steals every toothbrush in Axle City, Blaze's only chance at saving the day is to become Special Mission Blaze.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: At the Axle City Fair, Blaze and AJ realize they do not have enough coins to use the new Supersize Prize Machine; Blaze earns money by getting three different jobs, transforming into super-cool vehicles to take care of business.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When Zeg, Blaze and AJ find a tiny dinosaur egg, they must embark on a journey across a prehistoric landscape to return the egg to its Truckodactyl mother.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: On the day of the Team Truck Challenge, Crusher chooses someone other than Pickle as his partner, which disappoints Pickle.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze stops into Gabby's Garage for a quick repair, just as three far-flung trucks need her mechanical know-how; Blaze and AJ volunteer to help Gabby take her garage on the go.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: While driving through the desert, Blaze and AJ meet a magical genie who loves to grant wishes; when the genie loses the jewels that give him his powers, Blaze and AJ go on a quest to get them back.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Swift rescues Baddy; then, the Cadets have to rescue the HQ Command Flyer after Margo uses it to fly off with the Lemon Shack.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: The Cadets discover a haunted pirate treasure and sneak into Pirate Town to find out who or what is haunting it; Bea helps Penny with her Underwater Repair Badge when Earl's submersible barge springs a leak and needs rescuing.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: New cadets, including Swift, Penny, Rod and Brody, gather at Top Wing Academy, where they will learn to pilot their vehicles and become rescue birds.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: While the cadets work on their snowboarding badge, a falling tree knocks a gondola loose; the Cadets help Davey Hasselhawg give the little Turkskis a swim lesson, and then have to rescue Davey from a whirlpool.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: The Cadets graduate to a new level of training with new uniforms and new vehicles; as everyone gathers for the ceremony, the Cadets race to rescue Penny's family using the new vehicles they have not yet been trained on.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: The Cadets try to give Bea a day off, but when Swift's jet goes haywire, they need Bea to race to the rescue; Brody tries to land his amazing turbo-surfing move on land, as the Cadets compete in the Big Swirl Games.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: The Cadets are put to the test as they baby-sit some rambunctious tree goats who can climb anything; Rhonda's very big family comes for a reunion.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ babysit Baby Gherkin; when it's time for her nap, they tell her three epic bedtime stories about police, cowboys and superheroes: all starring Blaze and his friends.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When Axle City is visited by a littering raccoon, it's up to Blaze to save the day as a Super Recycling Truck; he cleans up the town and rescues his friends just in time for a final showdown with the Litter Critter.
